key_points: Revenue growth driven by 15% YoY increase in display technologies and 18% YoY growth in optical communications
Profitability impacted by freight & logistics costs, but expected to normalize in Q2
Earnings quality appears strong with 3% sequential growth in display technologies and 18% YoY growth in optical communications
Management guidance indicates strong demand and positive momentum across businesses, with Q2 core EPS $0.49-$0.53 and sales $3.3-$3.5 billion
earnings.reasoning: GLW's Q1 performance was mixed, with strong revenue growth in display technologies and optical communications, but profitability impacted by freight & logistics costs. Management guidance is positive, with strong demand and positive momentum expected to continue throughout 2021, but the impact of cost normalization in Q2 is uncertain.
